#   {.unnumbered .unlisted}

```{=latex}
\begin{center}
{\Huge\textbf{Manuscript}}
\end{center}
\newpage

\newgeometry{top=2.8cm,bottom=3.0cm,left=2.2cm,right=2.2cm}
\vspace*{1.2cm}
{\raggedright
\vspace{0.15cm}
{\fontsize{16}{20}\selectfont Heterogeneity in GLP-1, GIP and glucagon responses to the oral glucose tolerance test among individuals at high risk of type 2 diabetes: The ADDITION-PRO study\par}
\vspace{-0.8cm}
\noindent\rule{\textwidth}{0.4pt}
\vspace{-2cm}
{\fontsize{14}{18}\selectfont\textbf{Running title:} GLP-1, GIP and glucagon responses in prediabetes\par}
}

\vfill
\noindent
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.62\textwidth}
\small
\textbf{Author:} Mikkel Errboe Steentoft, MSc (cand.scient.san.)\\
\textbf{Affiliation:} Department of Public Health, Aarhus University\\
and Steno Diabetes Center Aarhus, Aarhus, Denmark\\
\textbf{Corresponding author:} Mikkel Errboe Steentoft\\
\textbf{Email:} milram@rm.dk\\
\textbf{Word count:} [xxxx]\\
\textbf{Number of tables:} 2\\
\textbf{Number of figures:} 2
\end{minipage}
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.22\textwidth}
\raggedleft
\small
Health\\
Aarhus University\\
2026
\end{minipage}
\restoregeometry
\setstretch{1.5}
\newpage
```
